name: Honey Garlic Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks.
2. Slowly add the olive oil while whisking to make a basic mayonnaise. Add the oil very slowly at first to achieve the desired consistency.
3. Once the mayonnaise is made, add all the ingredients except the vinegars (honey, red wine vinegar, and tarragon) in separate additions, ensuring the dressing is well mixed and ingredients are evenly distributed throughout.
4. Slowly stir in the red wine vinegar and then the honey, making sure that they are evenly blended.
5. Store the dressing in the refrigerator to prevent spoilage. Yield: 5 cups
